search.byImageHint: Upload a product photo and we'll find similar items.

hero.slide1Sub: Cookware, appliances, stoves and tableware — pay easily with MTN MoMo or Airtel Money.
hero.slide2Sub: Honest pricing on everything for your kitchen.
hero.slide3Sub: Anywhere in Rwanda — order now, we bring it to you.

detail.weDeliverText: Delivery fee is calculated at checkout based on your location.
detail.returnsText: Not satisfied? You can return it within 24 hours.
detail.similar: Similar items you might also like

howto.title: How to buy
howto.subtitle: Buying from us is fast, easy and safe. Follow these steps.
howto.s1d: Browse or search and use filters to quickly find what you want.
howto.s2d: Found something you like? Tap 'Add to cart'. You can review it any time.
howto.s3d: Go to the cart and tap 'Checkout', then confirm your details.
howto.s4d: Choose MTN MoMo, Airtel Money, or pay on delivery.
howto.s5d: Relax — your order is brought to you wherever you are.

app.title: Shop on the go
app.text: Download our app for a faster, smoother shopping experience with exclusive mobile-only deals.

contact.title: Visit or contact us
contact.payments: We accept MTN Mobile Money and Airtel Money

footer.careText: Need help? Our support team is available Mon–Sun, 9am–9pm.
